name: kiviuly-app
description: Kiviuly — landing for a young creative software studio

scripts.install:all: cd client && bun install && cd ../server && bun install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n client,server -c magenta,cyan "bun run dev:client" "bun run dev:server"
scripts.build: cd client && bun install && bun run build
scripts.start: cd server && bun install && bun run start
